rooms.name: Grand Foyer
rooms.description: A dust-choked entrance hall with a cracked glass chandelier hanging dangerously overhead.

items.name: Scorned Note
items.description: A crinkled message reading: 'Tonight, the master pays for his crimes...'

rooms.name: The Crimson Lounge
rooms.description: Velvet seats ring around a cold limestone hearth. The smell of high-end cigar smoke lingers.

items.name: Ornate Brass Key
items.description: A heavy key etched with the initials 'M.S.'

rooms.name: The Master's Study
rooms.description: A dark workspace filled with leatherbound ledgers and anomalous scientific journals.
rooms.vibe: Smelling of old paper, oil lanterns, and sealing wax

items.name: Altered Finance Ledger
items.description: Records show millions diverted right before the tragedy.
